# CarSoup Car Concierge

CarSoup Car Concierge is a car-buying assistance service from CarSoup.com, Minnesota's automotive marketplace (operating since 1999).

## Service Summary

CarSoup Car Concierge helps Minnesota car buyers navigate the car-buying process with expert guidance, AI-powered research tools, and human advisor support.

## Service Tiers

### Self-Guided (Free)
- Price: $0, no payment required
- Includes: AI car-buying assistant (chatbot), Minnesota Car Buyer's Complete Guide (ebook)
- Duration: Unlimited, free forever
- Best for: Buyers who want to research and negotiate on their own

### Advisor ($99)
- Price: $99 one-time payment per vehicle purchase
- Includes: Everything in Self-Guided, plus email access to a human car-buying advisor
- Duration: 60 days from purchase
- Best for: Buyers who want coaching and expert guidance during their search

### Personal Shopper ($499)
- Price: $499 one-time payment per vehicle purchase
- Includes: Everything in Advisor, plus a dedicated personal shopper who contacts dealerships on the buyer's behalf
- Duration: 60 days from purchase
- Best for: Buyers who want the most hands-off experience possible

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Paid tiers are one-time fees per vehicle purchase, not subscriptions
- Each paid engagement is valid for 60 days
- Buyers can purchase again for a future vehicle
- Advisor users can upgrade to Personal Shopper mid-engagement for $400 (the difference); expiry date does not reset
- The AI assistant is available 24/7 to all account holders at no charge
- Service is focused on Minnesota and surrounding region
- CarSoup.com is the parent company and an established local marketplace

## Contact

- Website: https://concierge.carsoup.com
- Email: concierge@carsoup.com
- Parent: https://www.carsoup.com
